routeDescription: Approved B-double route along the Hume Highway (A31) between Sydney and Albury-Wodonga. Route traverses 3 assessed bridge structures. Limiting structure is Jugiong Creek Bridge (1952 arch, POOR condition).
limitingConstraint: Mass posting at Jugiong Creek Bridge limits GCM to 42.5 t. Height clearance 4.2 m at Jugiong Creek Bridge.

routeDescription: Approved semi-trailer route along the Pacific Highway (A1) between Sydney and Brisbane. Key crossing is the Clarence River Bridge (1990 steel truss, GOOD condition, M1600 design load).
limitingConstraint: Clarence River Bridge is the longest span at 52.1 m. No mass restrictions. Height clearance 6.1 m.

routeDescription: HML pre-approved route under assessment connecting key grain receival points. Includes Hume Highway section and Pacific Highway coastal link. Assessment in progress — not yet approved for HML operations.
limitingConstraint: Preliminary review — awaiting road-friendly suspension certification audit.
